category_sources: Official GitHub README describes yewtube as a terminal based YouTube player and downloader.
source_facts.description says it is a terminal based YouTube player and downloader.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use yewtube.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, running via yt, and project features.
repo_sources: Official GitHub search result describes mps-youtube/yewtube as the project repository.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies terminal YouTube playback and downloading.
source_facts.executables lists yt as the CLI executable.
